aboutThisFragrance.title: About This Fragrance
aboutThisFragrance.p1: A fragrance that sparkles with the freshness of citrus fruits, radiating vitality and energy.
aboutThisFragrance.p2: A vibrant blend of grapefruit, bergamot, and citron unfolds, filling your heart with pure enthusiasm.
aboutThisFragrance.p3: The scent grows more radiant and captivating with notes of sandalwood, warmed by cinnamon and highlighted with bright ginger.
aboutThisFragrance.p4: Embrace every special moment of your day and leave a lasting impression with a luxurious fragrance that makes your presence unforgettable.

aboutTheProduct.title: About The Product
aboutTheProduct.p1: A fragrance that sparkles with the freshness of citrus fruits, radiating vitality and energy.
aboutTheProduct.p2: A vibrant blend of grapefruit, bergamot, and citron unfolds, filling your heart with pure enthusiasm.
aboutTheProduct.p3: The scent grows more radiant and captivating with notes of sandalwood, warmed by cinnamon and highlighted with bright ginger.
aboutTheProduct.p4: Embrace every special moment of your day and leave a lasting impression with a luxurious fragrance that makes your presence unforgettable.

aboutTheBrand.title: About The Brand
aboutTheBrand.p1: A fragrance that sparkles with the freshness of citrus fruits, radiating vitality and energy.
aboutTheBrand.p2: A vibrant blend of grapefruit, bergamot, and citron unfolds, filling your heart with pure enthusiasm.
aboutTheBrand.p3: The scent grows more radiant and captivating with notes of sandalwood, warmed by cinnamon and highlighted with bright ginger.
aboutTheBrand.p4: Embrace every special moment of your day and leave a lasting impression with a luxurious fragrance that makes your presence unforgettable.

ingredients.title: Ingredients
ingredients.p1: Aqua/Water/Eau, Dimethicone, Glycerin, Butylene Glycol, Propanediol, Ammonium Acryloyldimethyltaurate/Beheneth-25 Methacrylate Crosspolymer, Vinyl Dimethicone/Methicone Silsesquioxane Crosspolymer, Ammonium Polyacryloyldimethyl Taurate, C12-15 Alkyl Benzoate.

ingredientPyramid.title: Ingredient Pyramid
ingredientPyramid.description: Delve into the fragrance pyramid to see how top, heart, and base notes come together to create the scent’s full character.

blackCurrant.name: Black Currant
blackCurrant.description: A very important note for creating green, minty and fruity notes in perfumes.

pineapple.name: Pineapple
pineapple.description: A fresh and juicy fruity note, fresh and slightly metallic.

grapefruit.name: Grapefruit
grapefruit.description: A bitter aromatic citrus scent with a 'dirty' undertone reminiscent of black currant.

pinkPepper.name: Pink Pepper
pinkPepper.description: A fresh spicy floral and herbal top note with rosy nuance.

bergamot.name: Bergamot
bergamot.description: Citrusy, tart, and elegant with a hint of spice, known for flavoring Earl Grey tea.

patchouli.name: Patchouli
patchouli.description: An exotic Indian bush whose leaves yield patchouli oil sweet, earthy, and woody.

cardamom.name: Cardamom
cardamom.description: A sweet resinous aromatic and spicy note with a bitter aftertaste.

ginger.name: Ginger
ginger.description: A spicy fizzy top note, with a pronounced fresh citrus facet and piney nuance.

cinnamon.name: Cinnamon
cinnamon.description: A sweet and warm, powdery tenacious spicy note.

ambroxan.name: Ambroxan
ambroxan.description: A modern synthetic compound with a dry amber musky smell.

patchouliBase.name: Patchouli
patchouliBase.description: An exotic Indian bush whose leaves yield patchouli oil sweet, earthy, and woody.

vetiver.name: Vetiver
vetiver.description: Vetiver ranges from clean to smoky but is generally earthy, woody, and green.

notFound.title: Product Not Found
notFound.description: We're sorry, but the product you're looking for doesn't exist or is no longer available.

originalProductsDialog.title: 100% Original Product
originalProductsDialog.heading: Golden Scent : The House of the Originals
originalProductsDialog.description: One destination... unlimited fragrances & beauty choices! Your first beauty platform for authentic & best quality products from more than 700 brands to choose from. Indulge in this exceptional online shopping experience, loved & favored by millions of users in the Middle East.
originalProductsDialog.whyChooseDescription1: A platform you can count on, as we continuously thrive to deliver the highest standards and best quality for a great purchasing journey.
originalProductsDialog.whyChooseDescription2: For any questions our premium Customer Service will be happy to assist you.
